description: A multi-line text input for collecting longer text content such as descriptions, comments, or messages.
instructions: Use autosize to automatically grow the height as the user types. Use minRows to set the minimum visible height. Use Textarea.Root > Textarea.Slot for adding icon or action decorators on the left or right. Use TextInput for single-line input. Use EditableText for inline editing without a visible input border.
name: Textarea
